IMethodValidationValidateAsync Method

One Identity Manager API Server
Validates the method for the given validation context. This method will be called once for each method set that the method is a part of.

Namespace:  QBM.CompositionApi.ApiManager
Assembly:  QBM.CompositionApi.Server (in QBM.CompositionApi.Server.dll) Version: 9.3 v93-311513
Syntax
C#
Copy
Task ValidateAsync(
	IMethodValidationContext context,
	CancellationToken ct = null
)

Parameters

context
Type: QBM.CompositionApi.DefinitionIMethodValidationContext
ct (Optional)
Type: System.ThreadingCancellationToken

Return Value

Type: Task
